abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress
abort.weak_signal: Signal too weak — the device is probably outside your home.
abort.reconfigure_legacy: This legacy entry covers several thermostats and cannot be reconfigured. Remove it and add each thermostat individually.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the thermostat. Check it is powered and in Bluetooth range of a proxy, then try again.
error.pairing_failed: The thermostat refused the connection: a pairing prompt is probably waiting on its screen. Stay near the thermostat, confirm the prompt, then try again.

user.title: Configure Daikin Madoka
user.description:
Pick a discovered BRC1H thermostat or enter its Bluetooth MAC address. Run this flow again to add additional thermostats.

The connection is tested before the device is added. Stay near the thermostat: a pairing prompt may appear on its screen and need to be confirmed. See the documentation for pairing steps.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Daikin Madoka thermostat found
bluetooth_confirm.description:
Add {name} to Home Assistant?

The connection is tested first. Stay near the thermostat: a pairing prompt may appear on its screen and need to be confirmed.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Daikin Madoka
reconfigure.description: Update the thermostat's Bluetooth MAC address or its friendly name. A changed MAC is validated with a connection test first — stay near the thermostat: a pairing prompt may appear on its screen and need to be confirmed.

command_failed.message: Could not {action} on {device}: Bluetooth connection not available

device_unreachable.title: {device} is unreachable
device_unreachable.description: Home Assistant hasn't been able to reach the {device} thermostat for a while. Check that it is powered and within Bluetooth range. If you connect through an ESPHome Bluetooth proxy, the proxy must be flashed with pairing support and the thermostat paired to it — see the documentation. You can also try the device's Reconnect button.

pairing_required.title: {device} refuses the Bluetooth connection
pairing_required.description: Every Bluetooth path to {device} was refused because the proxy is not paired with it (tried via: {proxies}). Confirm the pairing prompt on the thermostat screen — required once per proxy — or set the unpaired proxy to passive mode. See the pairing documentation for details.
